headline: Why The Story Around United Airlines Holdings (UAL) Is Shifting On Demand Strength And Fuel Risks
summary: United Airlines Holdings has seen its modeled fair value price target nudged from US$138.85 to US$138.60, a small adjustment that still keeps the broader thesis intact. Analysts link this fine tuning to a mix of optimism around demand and earnings power on one side, and caution on fuel costs and the airline cycle on the other. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the wider debate and how you can track the narrative as it evolves. Stay updated as the Fair Value for...
